name: Sarah
story: Diagnosed with Leukemia at 5, Sarah's smile never fades. She loves painting and dreams of becoming an artist. Her resilience in the face of chemotherapy has inspired her entire community.

name: Liam
story: A baseball enthusiast fighting Osteosarcoma. His determination to return to the field inspires us all. Liam never misses a game on TV, even on his toughest treatment days.

name: Zoe
story: Small but mighty. Zoe helps other kids in the ward feel brave with her storytelling. She carries her cape everywhere she goes, reminding everyone that not all heroes wear uniforms.

name: James
story: James is a budding scientist who wants to cure cancer one day. He spends his hospital time reading biology books and asking doctors tough questions.

name: Emily
story: Emily loves to dance. Despite her diagnosis, she organizes mini dance-offs in the hospital hallway to lift everyone's spirits.

name: Michael
story: Michael is obsessed with dinosaurs. 'I'm as tough as a T-Rex,' he says. His bravery is truly prehistoric in scale.
